Tests the default behavior of the `toFixed` method on `Number.prototype`.

# Purpose
This code is a simple test script that verifies the behavior of the `toFixed` method on the `Number` prototype in JavaScript. It checks if calling `toFixed` without any arguments on a `Number` object returns the string `"0"`. This test ensures that the default behavior of `toFixed` is consistent with the expected output when no precision is specified. The script provides narrow functionality, focusing solely on this specific aspect of the `toFixed` method.
